title: Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd!
